anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Nirodha samapatti and cessation reports, where practitioners report a discontinuity or absence of consciousness rather than a pressure to posit an enduring witness.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Lowers confidence from candidate-discovery to novel-synthesis.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: If advanced practice can end reported consciousness without producing a subject-remainder pressure, the pressure is not an invariant. It may be tradition-specific, stage-specific, or retrospectively constructed.

claim_units: Self-negation can generate pressure to posit a final subject.
Traditions manage this pressure differently: ontologize, recursively analyze, bracket phenomenologically, or model it cognitively.
The pressure is separable from the inference policy used to interpret it.
Modern self-modeling and meta-awareness research can test the pressure without settling metaphysics.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Users should attribute a central agent more strongly when visible content and local mechanisms are made opaque but coherent behavior remains.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: When a model's outputs are stripped of content-level explanations, observers may feel pressure to posit a hidden agent, controller, or center behind behavior.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Opacity reduces agent attribution or produces only uncertainty, with no pressure toward hidden-subject explanations.

exact_claim: The bridge between Upanishadic witness language, early Buddhist not-self analysis, and modern consciousness research is remainder pressure: the felt or conceptual demand to posit a final subject after object-like contents have been negated.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Practitioners should describe a pull toward phrases such as something remains, knowing remains, no one owns it, or cannot locate the knower before choosing metaphysical language.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Remainder pressure should be detectable in reports before doctrinal interpretation is applied.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Micro-phenomenological interviews after self-inquiry, vipassana, open monitoring, and cessation-adjacent retreats.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Reports move directly into doctrine or simple absence without any intermediate pressure category.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Similar reports of content reduction should be resolved as Self, no-self, bracketed awareness, or self-model artifact depending on training context.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Training style should shape how the pressure is resolved, not whether the pressure can arise at all.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Longitudinal study of practitioners cross-trained in Advaita and Buddhist methods.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Training context predicts the entire phenomenology so strongly that no shared pressure stage can be identified.

minimal phenomenal experience witness consciousness non-egoic self-awareness Metzinger Gamma
consciousness without content Advaita Buddhism dreamless sleep cessation
nirodha samapatti cessation consciousness Laukkonen Slagter
self-model theory meditation no-self witness awareness

near_neighbors.difference: It does not frame these as pressure to posit a final subject after negation.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: High reduction for the empirical-adjacent mechanism.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close. The questionnaire maps pure-awareness reports using factors such as witness consciousness, mental agency, non-egoic self-awareness, wakeful presence, and self-knowledge.

near_neighbors.difference: The Lumenary idea adds a variable for how systems interpret the seeming remainder.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close. It connects nondual awareness, pure consciousness, rigpa, sakshin, turiya, and minimal phenomenal experience across contemplative traditions.
near_neighbors.source: Josipovic, Nondual Awareness and Minimal Phenomenal Experience, https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC7473343/

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate uses cessation as a test of remainder pressure rather than as a state taxonomy.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close anomaly and test surface. Cessation research treats reports of absent consciousness as scientifically investigable and potentially disruptive to metaphysical views of self.
near_neighbors.source: Laukkonen et al., Cessations of consciousness in meditation, https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0079612322001984

near_neighbors.difference: The Lumenary idea compares management policies across spiritual texts and practice reports.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close. Metzinger uses pure awareness reports as an entry point for minimal model explanation and self-model analysis.

next_loop_instructions: Define observable markers of remainder pressure before using it as an explanatory variable.
Code practitioner reports for pressure, interpretation, teacher prompt, and retrospective doctrinal framing.
Treat nirodha and dreamless sleep as anomaly cases.
Do not infer a universal phenomenological stage until micro-phenomenological interviews support it.
novelty_adjustment: Reduce novelty from 0.84 to about 0.61. The phrase is useful and may be generative, but it synthesizes known work on pure awareness, witness consciousness, self-modeling, and cessation.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say the pressure is just craving, selfing, witness fixation, or self-modeling, all already named in their fields.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: They say the term helps separate the arising of a reportable residue from the later move that turns it into Self, no-self, or cognitive artifact.
questions: After negating contents, do practitioners actually report a pressure to posit a final subject?
Can that pressure be distinguished from doctrine, teacher suggestion, and retrospective explanation?
Does naming remainder pressure change how you guide students who reify awareness?

primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The model may psychologize metaphysical claims and may invent a universal pressure that not all practitioners experience.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The search found close components in minimal phenomenal experience, self-model theory, attention and agency factors, pure consciousness debates, and nirodha research. No exact prior phrase remainder pressure appeared, but the mechanisms are not new enough to call a discovery without empirical coding.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: The texts show divergent management of remainder, but they do not clearly show a felt pressure. Brihadaranyaka supplies a seer-knower through a cosmological and theological sequence. SN 22.59 applies a disciplined not-self template to aggregates. The pressure variable is therefore not directly textual. It is an interpretive bridge from these texts to practice reports and cognitive science.

title: Remainder Pressure as the Hidden Variable in Self-Negation
unlike_statement: Unlike MPE, pure consciousness, or self-model literature, this idea names the pressure to promote a residual subject as a variable distinct from the tradition's final interpretation of that pressure.
